chinese_news.title: 千里科技再添筹码，或将整合吉利辅助驾驶团队｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
为助力千里科技成为“第二个华为”，吉利决定为它增添新的技术筹码。

36氪从多位产业人士处了解到，吉利中央研究院数百人的辅助驾驶团队，将在近期被整合入千里科技。目前，吉利研究院辅助驾驶团队，已有人收到了转移合同的通知。

有接近吉利的知情人士告诉36氪：“这轮整合后，吉利研究院辅助驾驶团队，被平移至千里智驾与极氪的合资公司千里浩瀚，千里浩瀚今后主要服务吉利这个核心客户。千里智驾可以将更多精力转移至其他主机厂客户。吉利暂定了这样一个整合方案。”针对以上信息，36氪向吉利求证，截止发稿，没有回应。

据公开信息显示，千里智驾是千里科技负责辅助驾驶研发的子公司，千里科技通过重庆江河间接持有千里智驾30%的股份。

千里浩瀚是千里智驾和极氪的合资公司，千里智驾和极氪分别持有千里浩瀚48%、47%的股份。

2025年8月，极氪辅助驾驶团队、旷世科技旗下辅助驾驶子公司迈驰智行，以及吉利研究院少数人，被整合入千里智驾，组成了一个约2000人规模的辅助驾驶研发团队。

有吉利人士对36氪表示，前一轮

chinese_news.title: 连续15年披露ESG报告，自然堂开始把“可持续”做成一门生意｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
在中国美妆行业增长放缓、价格竞争加剧的背景下，越来越多品牌开始重新审视“可持续发展”这件事的商业意义。

5月26日，自然堂集团发布《2025年度可持续发展报告》，这是其连续第15年披露ESG相关内容。相比早期以公益、环保为主的企业社会责任叙事，今年的报告更强调“可量化”与“产业化”：包括首次按照科学碳目标倡议（SBTi）标准制定减碳路径、扩大范围三碳排放披露边界，以及将生物多样性、绿色原料、智能制造与供应链效率直接绑定。

对于当前的中国美妆行业而言，这种变化并不只是“做ESG”，更像是在寻找下一阶段竞争力。

过去几年，ESG更多是国际消费品公司的标准动作。包括L'Oréal、Estée Lauder Companies、Shiseido等国际美妆集团，均已将减碳、绿色包装、生物多样性纳入长期战略，并逐步向供应链、原料采购与工厂体系延伸。

而随着国内美妆行业进入存量竞争阶段，ESG也开始从“附加项”变成影响品牌长期经营的重要变量。尤其是在高端化、研发能力、供应链透明度越来越被市

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜「穿越者」载人航天公司完成新一轮亿元融资，某头部互联网战投领投，探路者等跟投
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，北京穿越者载人航天科技有限公司（以下简称“穿越者”）近日完成Pre-A轮亿元融资，由某头部互联网战投领投，探路者集团等跟投，老股东中天汇富、彬复资本持续加注。光源资本担任本轮独家财务顾问。本轮融资资金将重点用于“穿越者壹号（CYZ1）”载人飞船核心系统研发、地面试验验证及关键技术攻关。

公司方面表示，引入互联网、人工智能、智能制造、户外装备及文旅场景等领域的产业资本，源于商业载人航天在科技、人文、消费与场景协同上的多重需求。这不仅有助于完善产业生态，也将推动太空旅游从“少数人的高端体验”逐步走向“大众化、普惠化”的新阶段。

「穿越者」是36氪长期关注的企业。公司成立于2023年1月，专注可重复使用载人飞船研制与太空旅游运营，致力于打造中国的“龙飞船”，实现为国家和商业低成本送人送货。

过去十年，中国商业航天��成了从0到1的技术验证与基础设施搭建，涌现出近40家商业火箭总体公司。中国商业航天进入政策红利释放、技术加速成熟、资本持续涌入的产业化关键期。

需求侧，载人飞船是商业航天赛道中直接to C的

chinese_news.summary: 2026 年 5 月 25 日，OPPO 举办 “Reno Land 奇幻夜”新品发布会，重磅发布多款新品，全新一代 OPPO Reno16 系列潮流手机、OPPO Pad 6 全能平板、 OPPO Pad Air5 学习平板、OPPO Enco Air5s 真无线降噪耳机、OPPO Bubble潮玩自拍屏同步登场。本次发布会围绕年轻用户学习、创作、社交、直播、游戏全场景需求，以潮流美学、实况影像创新、AI 智慧体验、跨设备生态协同为核心，实现手机、平板、耳机无缝联动；同时推出学生专属购机补贴，为学生群体打造一站式入学数码解决方案，重新定义年轻人的潮流移动智能生态。

chinese_news.title: 铃木敏文去世，他与711的三个反常识故事
chinese_news.summary:
铃木敏文

作者 | 钟艺璇
编辑 | 乔芊

5月25日，柒和伊控股发布讣告，日本7-Eleven创始人铃木敏文已于日前去世，享年93岁。

作为全球规模最大的连锁便利店品牌，7-Eleven与铃木敏文之间是一个续写与重生的故事，但他们的相遇却始于一次偶然。

1970年初，时任伊藤洋华堂高管的铃木敏文，远赴美国培训，在前往加利福尼亚

chinese_news.title: 谁是世界上第二爱泡泡玛特的人？
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 谢芸子

编辑 | 张帆 

一纸权益披露文件，让市场看到段永平对泡泡玛特的热爱绝不止是“口嗨”。

5月27日晚间，段永平与其全资控股的H&H International，同步增持了泡泡玛特的股份，一致行动人持股比例达5.69%，对应约7637.16万股，一跃成为仅次于创始人王宁的第二大股东。

知名投资人的每一次站台，总是能或多或少地提升市场信心。

截至发稿前，泡泡玛特收盘价161.5港元，涨幅4.74%。若以最新股价计算，段永平的这笔持仓对应的市值达到123亿港元。而他对泡泡玛特的态度，也堪称180度的“史诗级逆转”。

就在去年8月，当泡泡玛特的股价逼近历史高点、被称作“新消费茅台”时，段永平唱了反调，表示“看不懂10年后的泡泡玛特。”今年1月，他在雪球回应网友提问时还说，“依然无法理解人们为什么需要这个东西，万一过两年大家都不要了呢？”

两个月后，泡泡

chinese_news.title: 再花22亿乘胜追击，北京城建“龍樾”要抢跑了
chinese_news.summary:
5月28日，北京石景山区黄庄村43号棚户区改造项目SS00-1622-002、SS00-2501-002地块进入现场竞拍，最终该地块由北京城建兴通置业有限公司以底价22亿元摘得，成交楼面价约3.31万元/㎡。

北京城建兴通置业有限公司是北京城建的全资子公司。这是去年第四季度以来，北京城建第三次独立拿地补仓。

图源：天眼查

在拿下石景山黄庄村地块的同一时间，北京城建公布了这个新项目的案名：龍樾璟序。

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph reports BTC weakness at key $72K support; CoinDesk notes two-month winning streak at risk; Trump Iran meeting signals potential energy/macro stabilization.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Dell stock close above $140 by end of 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC reported Dell's fastest revenue growth since 2018 IPO; software sector (Snowflake, Okta) also confirms AI software TAM expansion.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Iran-U.S. nuclear deal framework be finalized by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump just held White House Situation Room meeting; oil market is already pricing in deal probability (Brent posted biggest monthly loss in six years).

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $2,500 by September 30, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. average gas price exceed $4.00/gallon by July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) weekly retail gasoline price data, national average
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran deal framework talks suggest oil supply normalization is priced in; but geopolitical risk (Romania/NATO tensions, Trump unpredictability) creates fat tail for energy shocks.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reported U.S. households already paying $450 more on gas/energy due to Iran war; Iran deal outcome will directly drive resolution.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Nvidia (NVDA) stock price fall below $120 by August 15, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or NASDAQ official closing price for NVDA
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Dell's AI server revenue surge (757% YoY) confirms sustained datacenter demand, which directly props NVDA; but market may underprice correction risk if fab utilization slows.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Dell's 32% pop signals robust AI chip demand; software sector strength (Snowflake, Okta) suggests healthy AI capex cycle, but valuations stretched.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX announce a Series G or later fundraising round (or achieve $200B+ valuation in secondary market) by November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: PitchBook, Crunchbase, or official SpaceX/Musk announcement via SEC filing or press statement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC report of IPO prospectus and SpaceX-Anthropic deal details suggest advanced financing discussions; Musk's history of capital raises accelerates post-IPO.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO rumors + Anthropic strategic partnership indicate Musk preparing consolidated narrative for trillion-dollar valuation push.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's 30-day realized volatility exceed 60% on any single day between now and September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or Messari Bitcoin volatility data, daily snapshots
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Iran deal finalization or breakdown, Fed policy shift, or macro shock could trigger flash volatility; current pricing does not reflect tail risk from geopolitical escalation.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump meeting on Iran deal, NATO-Russia tensions (Romania drone incident), and Federal Reserve policy uncertainty create multiple flashpoints.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the CFTC approve crypto perpetual futures contracts for at least 5 additional digital assets (beyond BTC/ETH) by October 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CFTC just issued first-ever crypto perp approvals (Kalshi, Coinbase); regulatory pathway is now open; market expects rapid expansion but hasn't priced in scale.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk and Cointelegraph report CFTC 'opens crypto perp door'; 24/7 trading advisory signals regulator comfort with expanded crypto derivatives ecosystem.

investment_theses.thesis: Semiconductor and AI infrastructure plays (NVDA, MU, TSM via exposure) outperform broader tech through Q4 2026 as Dell's 757% AI server revenue growth signals sustained capex cycle.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Dell posts fastest revenue growth since 2018 IPO, 757% YoY AI server revenue
CNBC: Software sector (Snowflake, Okta) posts best month since 2001 as 'SaaSpocalypse' fear subsides, confirming AI TAM expansion
CoinDesk: CFTC crypto perp approvals and 24/7 trading oversight signals regulatory framework for crypto institutional adoption
investment_theses.counter_view: AI capex cycle peaked; datacenter utilization rates decline as supply catches demand; semis already priced for perfection and vulnerable to margins compression.
investment_theses.expression: Long semiconductor ETF (SMH) or direct long NVDA/MU; hedge with short QQQ if macro deteriorates

investment_theses.thesis: Energy sector (XLE, crude oil) rallies 10%+ if Iran nuclear deal is finalized by end of Q3 2026, as market has front-run the supply relief but geopolitical tail risk remains.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Brent oil posted biggest monthly loss in six years as market counts on U.S.-Iran deal
BBC, CNBC: Trump held Situation Room meeting; U.S. and Iran agreed deal framework
CNBC: Iran war has cost average U.S. household $450 more on gas/energy—demand destruction visible, supply normalization = demand rebound
investment_theses.counter_view: Deal breaks down (Trump unpredictability, Iranian hardliners reject terms); geopolitical escalation (NATO-Russia, Israel-Iran proxy tensions) overwhelms supply normalization; demand stays weak.
investment_theses.expression: Long crude oil (CL=F futures) or XLE ETF; OR long DBC (commodities) if betting on broader reflation off deal clarity

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin consolidates above $72K through Q2 2026 as CFTC crypto perps and institutional adoption via Coinbase derivatives offset short-term retail weakness, setting up Q3 rally.

CoinDesk: Two-month winning streak in jeopardy but CFTC perp approvals at Kalshi/Coinbase unlock institutional derivatives trading
CoinDesk: CFTC advisory on 24/7 crypto trading signals regulatory comfort and removes institutional hesitation
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC breaks below $72K on macro recession signal or Trump policy reversal (trade war escalation); ETH weakness ($1.8K support tested) suggests broad crypto bearishness.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or BTC perpetual futures via Binance/Deribit; tight stop at $70K; position size reflects high volatility

investment_theses.thesis: Chinese EV and intelligent driving consolidation (via Geely's integration of autonomous teams into Qianli, per 36Kr) accelerates, creating M&A and IP value concentration; monitor for Nio/XPeng/Li Auto strategic moves.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: Geely integrating hundreds of ADAS engineers from central R&D into Qianli (Geely-Didi JV), signaling consolidation of autonomous tech
36Kr: SAIC (上汽) delivered 100M-vehicle milestone; SAIC-GM-Wuling (五菱) contributed 32M+ units, confirming mass market EV dominance in China
Trend: Chinese auto majors (SAIC, BYD, Geely) are consolidating ADAS/autonomous IP, reducing fragmentation
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese EV market oversaturation and price war continue to destroy margins; Qianli integration fails or duplicates existing capex; Nio/XPeng/Li Auto fail to consolidate.
investment_theses.expression: Monitor for Hong Kong-listed Geely HK.0175 or Chinese EV ETFs (KARS, NIO, XPEV, LI if directly trading); or watch for Nio/XPeng capital raises or partnership announcements

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin and on-chain yield become regulatory-approved infrastructure play in U.S.; USDC yields and stablecoin-settled derivatives (perps) drive crypto institutional adoption, benefiting Coinbase and Circle.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: CFTC approves crypto perpetual contracts at Kalshi and Coinbase; CFTC opens 'crypto perp door'
CoinDesk: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto; CFTC advisory on 24/7 crypto trading removes hesitation
CoinDesk: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act—signals institutional stakes in on-chain yield infrastructure
investment_theses.counter_view: CLARITY Act or future regulation bans stablecoin yield programs; banks block stablecoin adoption (Dimon's position); CFTC reverses perp approvals under political pressure.
investment_theses.expression: Long Coinbase (COIN) stock or track USDC TVL metrics; hedge stablecoin correlation if rate policy shifts; monitor Circle (CRO) IPO rumors

FLAGS_AND_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT.chinese_news_ahead_of_english: 36Kr BROKE Qianli/Geely ADAS integration story (hundreds of engineers moving, transfer contracts issued); this is a major autonomous driving consolidation signal that English media has NOT yet covered. Watch for Geely HK or linked equities to react.
FLAGS_AND_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT.geopolitical_volatility: Trump Iran deal talks (framework agreed, final determination pending) + NATO-Russia tensions (Romania drone incident) create tail risk for energy and macro. Oil market is front-running deal, but if talks break or escalate, Brent could spike sharply.
FLAGS_AND_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT.crypto_regulatory_inflection: CFTC crypto perp approvals + 24/7 trading advisory = major institutional adoption pathway unlocked. This is NOT yet fully priced into BTC/ETH or Coinbase (COIN). Create prediction markets on stablecoin yield and additional asset approvals.
FLAGS_AND_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT.dell_ai_server_boom: 757% YoY revenue growth is the strongest single signal of sustained AI capex. Confirms Nvidia, MU, TSM upside thesis through H2 2026. Watch for quarterly guidance in coming earnings for validation.
FLAGS_AND_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT.sui_network_stability: Cointelegraph notes Sui network stalled again after May 1 outage. If network reliability issues persist, could create opening for Solana (SOL) or other L1s to capture ecosystem. Monitor closely.
FLAGS_AND_ADDITIONAL_CONTEXT.taao_weakness: CoinDesk reports TAO (Bittensor) dropped 4%, leading CoinDesk 20 index lower. Could signal AI agent hype cycle cooling—or consolidation before next wave. Watch for correlation with Llama 3 releases and enterprise AI sentiment.
